query: Forecast PMs due in the next 30 days
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-pm-planning (NOT maximo-reliability — reliability is backward-looking)
Uses COALESCE(EXTDATE, NEXTDATE) for the effective due date — NOT just NEXTDATE
Filters PM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' (inactive/draft PMs don't generate work)
Expands PMSEQUENCE rows for multi-cadence PMs (does not undercount via COUNT(*) FROM PM alone)
Filters effective due date to current_date() through current_date() + 30 days
